History_List_Array.History_List: Event="7" Description="C:\Users\Kursat\Repos\erwin-addin\ErwinAlterDdl\test_files\oracle_19c_21c_v2.sql" SourcePath=".\Model_14\APP.ORDERS" Comment="" CreateTime="2026-04-23 02:09:10" Creator="Kursat" HistoryId="{C33A0D71-2BD9-4CCE-9300-8F32501B8C81}" SourceId="{F4EDBFDA-FD84-4A64-8298-189A00A7AA03}+00000000" SourceShortId="197"

AttributeProps.Name: promotion_id
AttributeProps.Font_Moniker: Microsoft Sans Serif 10 Red:46 Green: 65 Blue: 129 Western

AttributeProps.Name: order_date
AttributeProps.Font_Moniker: Microsoft Sans Serif 10 Western

AttributeProps.Name: order_amount
AttributeProps.Font_Moniker: Microsoft Sans Serif 10 Red:46 Green: 65 Blue: 129 Western

AttributeProps.Name: order_status
AttributeProps.Font_Moniker: Microsoft Sans Serif 10 Red:46 Green: 65 Blue: 129 Western

AttributeProps.Name: last_updated
AttributeProps.Font_Moniker: Microsoft Sans Serif 10 Red:46 Green: 65 Blue: 129 Western

TriggerProps.Name: TR_ORDERS_TIMESTAMP
TriggerProps.Trigger_Body:
CREATE %CreateOrReplace TRIGGER %ProcedureOwner(.)%TriggerName %Fire %Actions(" OR ") ON %TableOwner(.)%TableName %RefClause %Scope %TriggerWhen BEGIN :NEW.last_updated := SYSTIMESTAMP;
IF UPDATING('order_status') AND :OLD.order_status != :NEW.order_status THEN INSERT INTO APP.TRANSACTION_LOG (txn_id, customer_id, txn_date, txn_amount, txn_type) VALUES (APP.SEQ_TRANSACTION_LOG.NEXTVAL, :NEW.customer_id, SYSTIMESTAMP, :NEW.order_amount, 'STATUS_CHG'); END IF; END;

TriggerProps.Name: tD_ORDERS
tU_ORDERS

AttributeProps.Font_Moniker: Microsoft Sans Serif 10 Red:0 Green: 72 Blue: 190 Western

CHILD UPDATE SET NULL
CHILD DELETE RESTRICT
CHILD DELETE CASCADE
PARENT INSERT RESTRICT
UPDATE HEADER
Trigger_TemplateProps.Template_Code: CREATE %CreateOrReplace TRIGGER %If(%TriggerName) {%ProcedureOwner(.)%30TriggerName} %Else {%ProcedureOwner(.)t%1Action_%27TableName} AFTER %Action ON %TableName for each row -- erwin Builtin Trigger -- %Action trigger on %TableName DECLARE NUMROWS INTEGER; BEGIN

Trigger_TemplateProps.Name: UPDATE FOOTER
DELETE HEADER
Trigger_TemplateProps.Template_Code: CREATE %CreateOrReplace TRIGGER %If(%TriggerName) {%ProcedureOwner(.)%30TriggerName} %Else {%ProcedureOwner(.)t%1Action_%27TableName} AFTER %Action ON %TableName for each row -- erwin Builtin Trigger -- %Action trigger on %TableName DECLARE NUMROWS INTEGER; BEGIN

Trigger_TemplateProps.Name: DELETE FOOTER
INSERT HEADER
Trigger_TemplateProps.Template_Code: CREATE %CreateOrReplace TRIGGER %If(%TriggerName) {%ProcedureOwner(.)%30TriggerName} %Else {%ProcedureOwner(.)t%1Action_%27TableName} BEFORE %Action ON %TableName for each row -- erwin Builtin Trigger -- %Action trigger on %TableName DECLARE NUMROWS INTEGER; BEGIN

Trigger_TemplateProps.Name: INSERT FOOTER
CUSTOM TRIGGER HEADER
Trigger_TemplateProps.Template_Code: CREATE %CreateOrReplace TRIGGER %ProcedureOwner(.)%TriggerName %Fire %Actions(" OR ") ON %TableOwner(.)%TableName %RefClause %Scope %TriggerWhen

CHILD UPDATE NO ACTION
PARENT DELETE NO ACTION

AttributeProps.Name: email_verified
AttributeProps.Font_Moniker: Microsoft Sans Serif 10 Western

ViewProps.Name: VW_ORDER_DETAIL
ViewProps.SQL: CREATE OR REPLACE VIEW APP.VW_ORDER_DETAIL ( order_id,customer_id,order_date,order_amount,order_status ) AS SELECT o.order_id,o.customer_id,o.order_date,o.order_amount,o.order_status FROM APP.ORDERS o WHERE o.order_status IN ('OPEN', 'PENDING');

AttributeProps.Name: order_id
AttributeProps.Font_Moniker: Microsoft Sans Serif 10 Western

History_List_Array.History_List: Event="7" Description="C:\Users\Kursat\Repos\erwin-addin\ErwinAlterDdl\test_files\oracle_19c_21c_v2.sql" SourcePath=".\Model_14\R_6" Comment="" CreateTime="2026-04-23 02:09:10" Creator="Kursat" HistoryId="{23763EBF-37F0-49A2-A363-0C0AEEB7CFEA}" SourceId="{C1EB9A19-33BE-481F-ABC5-DD6EEB271E2B}+00000000" SourceShortId="282"

AttributeProps.Font_Moniker: Microsoft Sans Serif 10 Western

AttributeProps.Name: order_date
AttributeProps.Font_Moniker: Microsoft Sans Serif 10 Western

AttributeProps.Name: order_amount
AttributeProps.Font_Moniker: Microsoft Sans Serif 10 Western

AttributeProps.Name: order_status
AttributeProps.Font_Moniker: Microsoft Sans Serif 10 Western

ViewProps.Name: VW_TRANSACTION_DAILY
ViewProps.SQL: CREATE OR REPLACE VIEW APP.VW_TRANSACTION_DAILY ( txn_day,customer_id,txn_type,txn_count,total_amount ) AS SELECT TRUNC (txn_date),APP.TRANSACTION_LOG.customer_id,APP.TRANSACTION_LOG.txn_type,COUNT(*),SUM (txn_amount) FROM APP.TRANSACTION_LOG GROUP BY TRUNC (txn_date), customer_id, txn_type;

AttributeProps.Name: txn_day
AttributeProps.Font_Moniker: Microsoft Sans Serif 10 Western

History_List_Array.History_List: Event="7" Description="C:\Users\Kursat\Repos\erwin-addin\ErwinAlterDdl\test_files\oracle_19c_21c_v2.sql" SourcePath=".\Model_14\ER_Diagram_118\Model Shape_289" Comment="" CreateTime="2026-04-23 02:09:10" Creator="Kursat" HistoryId="{A1B20BB5-4EFE-4496-98FE-76E33AFB09F1}" SourceId="{C0554FBB-6D74-445D-965D-2202041E95AE}+00000000" SourceShortId="289"
